title: hitsHits
description: Search hit representing a matched document

_id.description: The ID of the matched document

_score.description: The score of the matched document

_source.description: The source data of the matched document

_knn_dist.description: The knn distance of the matched document returned for knn queries

highlight.description: The highlighting-related data of the matched document

table.description: The table name of the matched document returned for percolate queries

_type:.description: The type of the matched document returned for percolate queries

fields.description: The percolate-related fields of the matched document returned for percolate queries
